mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% signals central bank intervention risks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors price in rate hikes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% YoY despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust demand-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of concurrent GDPC1 and HOUST growth are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the interaction term's coefficient is non-significant.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market (UNRATE < 4.5%) combined with strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 100k) signals inflationary pressures, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as markets anticipate rate hikes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE < 4.5% and PAYEMS > 100k despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) growth indicates resilient supply-side capacity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through improved corporate margins and reduced inflation expectations.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods of INDPRO growth are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the coefficient on INDPRO is non-significant.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in real sales (RSAFS) below 375k signals weak consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as corporate earnings forecasts are revised downward.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where RSAFS falls below 375k despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A dovish monetary policy bias (FEDFUNDS < 3%) combined with low inflation (CPIAUCSL < 2%) creates a favorable environment for equity valuations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of FEDFUNDS < 3% and CPIAUCSL < 2% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the interaction term's coefficient is non-significant.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment (UNRATE falls > 0.5pp) during a recessionary environment signals a labor market recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors anticipate economic stabilization.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls > 0.5pp during a recession despite positive signal.
